error_signature: verification fails due to CNAME conflict
title: Domain verification fails with CNAME records
symptom: When attempting to verify ownership of a subdomain with Paddle.com, the verification fails due to conflicts with existing CNAME records.
applies_when: Subdomain is configured with CNAME records
not_this_if: Using A records instead of CNAME records
root_cause: Paddle.com requires a TXT record for domain verification, but if a CNAME record is present for the same subdomain, it can prevent the TXT record from being added or recognized, leading to verification failures.
fix_steps: Transfer DNS management to a service like Cloudflare that allows adding TXT records without conflicts.
In Cloudflare, add the required TXT record for Paddle.com verification.
Wait for DNS propagation and then attempt the verification again.
agent_instruction: Transfer your DNS management to Cloudflare and add the necessary TXT record for Paddle.com.
